text: Delivered Eigen.eigNonsymmetric (dense + Arnoldi operator paths). Dense: Francis full solve, pair-aware unit permutation (never-split rule: Count(k) -> k+1 on a boundary pair; tie-break desc-real then desc-imag per parity §2; All = LargestMagnitude canonical). Iterative: Arnoldi CGS-twice, growing subspace exact at m=n, projected Hessenberg via nonsymmetricEigen kernel, true per-unit residuals in real arithmetic, pairs converge as units, requested = max(k, never-split target) keeping allConverged meaningful under boundary pairs and happy-breakdown shrink. Left/LeftAndRight -> UnsupportedOperation: left vectors DEFERRED (scope decision, parity doc updated, bead gale-left-eigenvectors). Adversarial review: no bugs — pair permutation hand-traced on mixed spectra incl. exact-tie case, H=VtAV exactness verified, residual signs verified; two lock-in tests added per review (iterative k+1 boundary + ritzReal branch on mixed real+complex spectrum; dense exact-magnitude tie-break direction). Verified: coreJVM 267/267, coreJS 264/264, laws 17/17 both, parity 29/29. Committed.
